text: This is the VOA Special English Technology Report.
zh: 这是美国之音特别英语科技报道。

text: Scientists say enough energy is wasted in the oil and gas fields
zh: 科学家称,德克萨斯州油气田每年浪费的能源

text: of Texas every year to provide electricity to 100 ,000 homes.
zh: 足以为10万户家庭提供电力。

text: Businessman Loy Sneary says he is using that wasted energy
zh: 商人洛伊·斯尼里说他正在利用这些被浪费的能源

text: to create a profitable business called Gulf Coast Green Energy. energy.
zh: 创办了一家名为“Gulf Coast Green Energy”的盈利企业。

text: Loy Snary says 60 % of all energy produced in the world today is being lost as wasted heat.
zh: 洛伊·斯尼里说,当今世界生产的能源中有60%都以废热形式流失。

text: He wants to capture some of that heat from the thousands of oil and gas wells in Texas
zh: 他想从德克萨斯州数千个油气井中捕获部分这种热量,

text: and turn it into electricity. He says the potential electricity that could be created
zh: 并将其转化为电力。他说,这样可能产生的电力

text: is greater than all the coal -fired plants, natural gas plants,
zh: 甚至超过全世界所有燃煤电厂、天然气电厂

text: and nuclear power plants in the world. Deep underground, the earth is hot.
zh: 和核电站的总量。地下深处,地球是炽热的。

text: If you drive a drill down into hard rock or shale, the drill bit gets hot.
zh: 如果你把钻头钻入坚硬的岩石或页岩,钻头就会变热。

text: Loy Sneary uses his Green Machine technology
zh: 洛伊·斯尼里利用他的“绿色机器”技术

text: to capture some of the energy that is produced when hot meets cold.
zh: 来捕获冷热相遇时产生的部分能量。

text: The machine moves hot well water through one pipe
zh: 该机器让热井水通过一根管道流动,

text: next to one filled with a cooling fluid called refrigerant.
zh: 这根管道紧邻另一根装有制冷剂的管道。

text: The refrigerant boils and steam is produced. This This steam is used to make electricity.
zh: 制冷剂沸腾产生蒸汽,这些蒸汽被用来发电。

text: In fact, Loy Sneary says much of the technology works just like a steam turbine.
zh: 事实上,洛伊·斯尼里说,这项技术的原理很像蒸汽轮机。

text: It is not just oil and gas wells that can provide waste heat
zh: 不仅油气井能提供废热,

text: for the green energy machine to use for electricity.
zh: 供这种绿色能源机器用于发电。

text: The heat recycling technology can work with solar energy collectors,
zh: 这种热能回收技术还可用于太阳能收集装置、

text: coal -burning power plants, and internal combustion engines.
zh: 燃煤电厂和内燃机。

text: Loy Sneary says almost any industrial process that produces waste heat can produce power.
zh: 洛伊·斯尼里说,几乎任何产生废热的工业过程都能用来发电。

text: Last year, Loy Sneary connected his device to the boilers at Southern Methodist University in Dallas, Texas.
zh: 去年,洛伊·斯尼里把他的设备连接到德克萨斯州达拉斯南方卫理公会大学的锅炉上。

text: He used that system's waste heat to create electricity,
zh: 他利用该系统产生的废热来发电,

text: helping to reduce the university's energy costs.
zh: 帮助降低了学校的能源成本。

text: Maria Richards is SMU's geothermal laboratory coordinator. She says
zh: 玛丽亚·理查兹是南方卫理公会大学地热实验室的协调员。她说,

text: the lab's temperature maps help Loy Sneary find hot areas near oil drilling operations.
zh: 实验室的温度地图帮助洛伊·斯尼里找到油井作业附近的高温区域。

text: Those areas are where he can deploy his machines.
zh: 这些区域正是他可以部署设备的地方。

text: The school and Gulf Coast Green Energy have worked together for several years.
zh: 该校与Gulf Coast Green Energy已经合作多年。

text: Maria Richards says there is a lot of heat in the Gulf Coast area.
zh: 玛丽亚·理查兹说,墨西哥湾沿岸地区蕴藏着大量热能。

text: She says that made her group realize it could use that resource
zh: 她说这让她的团队意识到,可以通过与油气井合作

text: by working with the oil and gas wells.
zh: 来利用这一资源。

text: Loi Sneary is now negotiating with drillers in Texas
zh: 洛伊·斯尼里目前正在与德克萨斯州的钻井公司洽谈,

text: and is working on a project in West Virginia.
zh: 并在西弗吉尼亚州开展一个项目。

text: He is also looking at other states. Find transcripts, MP3s
zh: 他还在考察其他州的机会。欲查看我们报道的文字稿、MP3音频

text: and PDFs of our reports for e -readers at voaspecialenglish .com.
zh: 以及适用于电子阅读器的PDF文件,请访问voaspecialenglish.com。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Mario Ritter.
zh: 我是马里奥·里特,这是美国之音特别英语。
